title: Sweet Chewy Lazy-Sunday Uruguayan Steak Stir-fry
description: This savory dish combines tender minced beef with sweet flavors and raw-friendly textures for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Lean mince beef
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's lean to avoid excess fat

ingredients.name: Sweet corn kernels
ingredients.notes: Frozen or fresh can be used, thaw if frozen

ingredients.name: Red bell pepper
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for color and texture

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Finely chopped to enhance flavor and sweetness

ingredients.name: Ketchup or tomato sauce
ingredients.notes: Provides sweetness without being too sweet

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste, optional for added sweetness

ingredients.name: Chili flakes or seeds (optional)
ingredients.notes: To add a little kick, optional

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced beef and cook until browned on all sides. Remove from pan.
In the same pan, add chopped onion and red bell pepper. Sauté until softened.
Return beef to the pan along with ketchup or tomato sauce and sugar. Mix well.
Stir in turmeric powder for color and aroma if desired.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Add a pinch of chili flakes (optional) for extra flavor.
Mix everything together until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course. Enjoy your Lazy-Sunday Uruguayan Steak Stir-fry!
